_note: P2.10 Step 10a — Solana DEVNET manifest. $0 pilot-ready path. The real program_id / registry_pda / deploy_tx / publisher_address are filled in by scripts/deploy_sol_devnet.sh after `anchor build` + `solana program deploy`. For mainnet (Step 10b), copy this to deployed_sol_mainnet.json, redeploy with the SAME keypair (same program ID), and set network=mainnet.
